title: Korean Premium Sports Magazine Cover Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Korean Premium Sports Magazine Cover Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Korean-style premium sports magazine cover portrait of adult male athlete with clean-cut hair and strong determined expression, built around confident half-body athletic presence. Subject: adult male athlete with clean-cut hair and strong determined expression wears premium black training jacket over fitted athletic top; the expression and body language show standing confidently, looking slightly downward toward the camera with calm intensity without turning into a back-view football poster. Scene: minimal Korean sports magazine cover studio backdrop with subtle arena atmosphere provides a clean commercial sports editorial environment with controlled background, strong presence, and magazine-cover polish. Composition: Half-body portrait from mid-torso upward, slightly angled frontal view, male subject centered, camera slightly below or level enough to make the downward gaze feel strong and determined. Signature Elements: Preserved korean premium sports magazine cover portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-quality Korean commercial sports photography with premium magazine-cover energy, crisp focus, polished skin and fabric detail, confident athletic styling, and clean modern editorial finish. Color Palette: Controlled sports-magazine palette using deep neutrals, clean highlights, and subtle accent colors that keep the face and upper body dominant. Lighting: Dramatic but clean commercial sports lighting with strong facial modeling, shoulder highlights, and magazine-cover contrast without harsh stadium clutter. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Korean Premium Sports Magazine Cover Portrait Adult Male Athlete With Clean Cut Hair And Strong Determined Expression

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Korean-style premium sports magazine cover portrait of adult male swimmer with damp hair and focused eyes, built around confident half-body athletic presence. Subject: adult male swimmer with damp hair and focused eyes wears navy zip training top with minimal sponsor-free details; the expression and body language show half-body stance, shoulders squared, chin slightly lowered, controlled competitive focus without turning into a back-view football poster. Scene: clean blue-gray premium sports magazine backdrop with soft reflective highlights provides a clean commercial sports editorial environment with controlled background, strong presence, and magazine-cover polish. Composition: Half-body portrait from mid-torso upward, slightly angled frontal view, male subject centered, camera slightly below or level enough to make the downward gaze feel strong and determined. Signature Elements: Preserved korean premium sports magazine cover portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-quality Korean commercial sports photography with premium magazine-cover energy, crisp focus, polished skin and fabric detail, confident athletic styling, and clean modern editorial finish. Color Palette: Controlled sports-magazine palette using deep neutrals, clean highlights, and subtle accent colors that keep the face and upper body dominant. Lighting: Dramatic but clean commercial sports lighting with strong facial modeling, shoulder highlights, and magazine-cover contrast without harsh stadium clutter. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
